questions.question: What were the names of the TV police officers played by Sharon Gless and Tyne Daly?
Name the wife of the exiled and corrupt Philippine dictator who had 1,200 pairs of shoes.
What band included Chuck and John Panozzo, Tommy Shaw, James "JY" Young, and Dennis DeYoung?
Name the bass guitarist for the Sex Pistols who was accused of murdering his girlfriend, and then died of a drug overdose.
In the 70s, what car company launched their famous and enduring slogan, "The ultimate driving machine"?
